evolutionSummary: Universal Tuya Zigbee has advanced significantly, adding 820 new fingerprints across 193 drivers and strengthening automation. The project integrated broad device variants under `_TZE200_s8gkrkxk` (TS0601, TS0502B, TS0052, TS1101, TS0203, RH3001, SNZB-04, TS110E/F, TS130F), expanding coverage for sensors, remotes, and controls. Automation processed 108 issues and 36 PRs, closing stale threads, validating fingerprints, and enforcing SDK3 compliance. Key fixes stabilized BSEED ZCL broadcast behavior, resolved the “56 Years Ago” sleepy-device initialization gap via passive Tuya cluster listeners, corrected double-division DP parsing, and hardened button detection with proper app-command windows. Action items focus on completing driver migrations, updating user-facing pairing guidance for re-added models, extending energy DP heuristics, and maintaining legacy anchors to protect existing installations while scaling the unified parser and analytics pipeline.
